title: bupleurum ranunculoides var. humile
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides var. humile, also known as small umbrella plant or Chinese thorowax, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides var. humile include reducing fever, alleviating liver and gallbladder issues, and supporting immune function. Bupleurum ranunculoides var. humile can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
